  • Pack includes 10 Cube Boxes (56 Tissues Per Box) of Puffs Ultra Soft Facial Tissues
  • Perfect size to stash anywhere
  • Gentle on sensitive skin
  • Made with cushiony thickness
  • Comforts needy noses
  • Dermatologist tested to be gentle on skin

  • Sniffles and sneezes can come when you least expect, keep Puffs within reach to always protect.

Product Description

Keep the cushiony softness of Puffs Ultra Soft facial tissues around to ease your sniffles and sneezes. Puffs facial tissues cushions your nose from ordinary tissues so you can skip any sore, red nose issues. Puffs Ultra Soft is our strongest non-lotion tissue and is stronger when wet versus Kleenex Trusted Care. Puffs Ultra Soft is gentle and has the softness and strength your delicate nose needs, all year round.  Puffs Ultra Soft facial tissues are available in both cube and rectangle box sizes, so you can chose the right size for your family's essential tissue needs! A nose in need deserves Puffs indeed!

From the manufacturer

Puffs Tissues That Pack Softness

Perfect for Any Use

Puffs Ultra Soft is always ready for colds, allergies, runny noses, or even intense sneezes. The combination of softness and strength make them perfect for any use.

Cushiony Softness

Unlike other tissues that are rolled flat when made, Puffs Ultra Soft tissues have more pillowy softness to cushion every blow.

Lotion-Free and Fragrance-Free

Puffs Ultra Soft is perfect for when sore or sensitive noses need some extra non-lotion softness without fragrance.

Designs to Fit Your Life

Puffs Ultra Soft cube and family size boxes always look their best, no matter where you put them or which one you get.

Puffs' Sustainability Promise

Puffs Supports Reforestation

We are partnering with conservation organizations to help restore forests and protect wildlife.

Puffs Protects Forests

Puffs tissues are proudly made with pulp from well-managed, FSC certified forests and other controlled material, respecting workers and indigenous Peoples while protecting wildlife habitats.

How customer reviews and ratings work

Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

Sponsored

Customers say

Customers find these facial tissues remarkably soft, particularly for sensitive noses, and appreciate their good quality and value for money. They provide great comfort, being gentle on sensitive skin around the nose. Regarding durability, while some customers find them very durable, others report that they tear apart easily.
AI Generated from the text of customer reviews Generated from the text of customer reviews

Select to learn more

277 customers mention softness, 242 positive, 35 negative277 customers mention "Softness"242 positive35 negative
Customers find these tissues remarkably soft, particularly noting they are gentle enough for sensitive noses and don't leave marks on the skin.
"Good tissues, soft, strong, packed too tightly in individual boxes so that a number of tissues tear into pieces until enough are removed to allow..." Read more
"Very soft, but trying to pull the first dozen tissues is awful, they tear because it's packed in so tightly...." Read more
"I am extremely confident with durability and softness of this product. Great for adults and has the sensitivity to use with children." Read more
"So soft! Really can't beat Puffs! When you're sick with a head cold the last thing you should have to worry about is a sore nose on top of it!" Read more
256 customers mention quality, 219 positive, 37 negative256 customers mention "Quality"219 positive37 negative
Customers find these facial tissues to be of good quality, with one customer noting they perform particularly well during sneezes.
"Title says everything! Good price and great product! The only tissue I use! Never hurt my nose ☺️ I love it and highly recommend!..." Read more
"Soft tissues of good quality but I ordered the holiday themed boxes because I couldn't find them in stores and that is not what I received...." Read more
"I love these tissues, as they are nice and soft but don't leave that gross lotion feeling behind on your hands and fave...." Read more
"Good product if this is what you want. From the picture I thought it was regular size tissue boxes however they are small half size square boxes...." Read more
166 customers mention value for money, 139 positive, 27 negative166 customers mention "Value for money"139 positive27 negative
Customers find these tissues good value for money, noting they save money in the long run and offer quality for the price.
"Okay, everything was perfect and a great price... I would do it again but only one thing bothered me......" Read more
"Quality product with a well known brand name, plus a good value...." Read more
"Good price. Study tissue. Doesn't tear easily. Absorbent. Boxes aren't beautiful but I usually change them into boxes that are to my liking...." Read more
"The quality of these tissues is very high. They are a great value. I like having extra boxes on hand. They’re soft on the nose." Read more
124 customers mention durability, 75 positive, 49 negative124 customers mention "Durability"75 positive49 negative
Customers have mixed experiences with the tissues' durability, with some finding them very durable and noting they don't crumble, while others report that they tear apart and are more fragile than other tissues.
"...It’s soft, absorbent and strong. Since I have year round allergies, I have a box in my vehicle and in every room of my the house at all times. Thanks." Read more
"This is the worst tissue I have ever purchased. It tears when you try to take it out of box...." Read more
"...A must have for when driving. Decent price. Soft, and durable!" Read more
"...They are sturdy enough to come out of the box without tearing, plus they’re soft." Read more

5 out of 5 stars
Will purchase again
Perfectly soft, perfect for that sore nose. I was blowing my nose with napkins, and after these arrived, I no longer have a red nose. I’ve been sick with the flu for a little over two weeks and these are the best tissues I have used in a long time.

  • Nichole MacAskill
    4.0 out of 5 stars Soft, Strong, and Reliable
    Reviewed in the United States on March 24, 2026
    Size: 56 Count (Pack of 10)Verified Purchase
    These tissues are really soft and comfortable to use, especially when you need them often. They are gentle on the skin but still strong enough that they do not fall apart easily.

    The cube boxes are a great size and convenient to keep around the house or in different rooms. They look clean and fit nicely on counters or desks.

    The only downside is they are a little spendy, but the quality definitely shows.

    Overall, they are soft, strong, and reliable. Just slightly higher in price than some others, but still a great option.

About this Item

  • Pack includes 10 Cube Boxes (56 Tissues Per Box) of Puffs Ultra Soft Facial Tissues
  • Perfect size to stash anywhere
  • Gentle on sensitive skin
  • Made with cushiony thickness
  • Comforts needy noses
  • Dermatologist tested to be gentle on skin
  • A nose in need deserves MORE Puffs indeed! MORE boxes so you don't run out.
  • Sniffles and sneezes can come when you least expect, keep Puffs within reach to always protect.

Product Description

Keep the cushiony softness of Puffs Ultra Soft facial tissues around to ease your sniffles and sneezes. Puffs facial tissues cushions your nose from ordinary tissues so you can skip any sore, red nose issues. Puffs Ultra Soft is our strongest non-lotion tissue and is stronger when wet versus Kleenex Trusted Care. Puffs Ultra Soft is gentle and has the softness and strength your delicate nose needs, all year round.  Puffs Ultra Soft facial tissues are available in both cube and rectangle box sizes, so you can chose the right size for your family's essential tissue needs! A nose in need deserves Puffs indeed!
